guardrails: Read only enough local context to confirm the U-primary implementation workflow exists and is retired/blocked.
Return JSON only using the workflow output contract.

codex_cli_smoke.prompt: This is a Codex CLI orchestration smoke test. Do not edit any files. Do not create commits. Read only enough local context to confirm these branch facts: tools/commentary_orchestrator/workflows/u_primary_implementation.json exists, its metadata marks it retired/blocked, and it must not run implementation work until PositionFixtureLaw exists and a replacement workflow is written against live reset docs. Then return JSON only matching the provided schema with status `completed`, needs_human false, next_tasks [], and a short summary that states whether the smoke test confirmed the CLI can read the branch context.
